displayTitle: The High Republic (2021) Vol 2: The Heart of the Drengir
synopsis: The High Republic: The Heart of the Drengir Volume 2 is an action-packed continuation of the epic Star Wars saga set during the High Republic era. This graphic novel follows the heroic Jedi and their allies as they struggle to stop the ruthless Drengir, an ancient species of sentient plants bent on spreading destruction and chaos throughout the galaxy.
title: The High Republic (2021) Vol 2: The Heart of the Drengir
